context.audience: Developers moving from managed platforms to VPS for cost control, European teams preferring EU-based hosting providers, indie hackers self-hosting applications on budget-friendly servers
pain_points: Initial VPS server setup and security hardening for production use
Choosing between European VPS providers like Hetzner, Contabo, and OVH
Setting up automated deployments to VPS without managed CI/CD platforms
Managing SSL certificates, domain routing, and reverse proxies
Scaling from a single VPS to multiple servers as traffic grows
content_that_works: Cost comparison between VPS and managed platforms
subtopics: VPS vs managed platform cost comparison
